summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The iShares U.S. ETF Trust iShares GSCI Commodity Dynamic Roll Strategy ETF (COMT) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P GSCI Dynamic Roll index. The fund tracks a broad-market commodity index that utilizes a flexible dynamic roll strategy. COMT was launched on Oct 16, 2014 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: US Says China to Buy $17 Billion in Farm Goods Annually
data.text: China has agreed to buy at least $17 billion of agricultural products annually through 2028, the US said after Donald Trump and Xi Jinping held a major summit in Beijing last week. Bloomberg's Stephen...

data.title: White House touts deals on soybeans and rare earths after Trump-Xi summit, while China talks up tariff cuts
data.text: China will buy $17 billion of U.S. agricultural products each year through 2028, the White House said. The U.S. readout also mentioned access to rare earths, while China's did not.

data.title: Jeff Reeves's Strength in Numbers: As the stock market struggles, look at these ‘hard-asset' commodity funds
data.text: As the crisis over Ukraine escalates, major stock-market indexes are retesting their lowest levels of the year, often after losses of more than 10%.

data.title: Reflation trade in full swing as commodities outpace S&P 500, demand for metals, oil soars
data.text: The reflation trade is in full swing. Invesco's John Hoffman shares what he's seeing in the commodities market.

data.text: The "Fast Money" traders give you 3 names to trade amid raising tensions in the White House.
